heading: Definition of taxable estate
label: 2051 Definition of taxable estate
text: For purposes of the tax imposed by section 2001, the value of the taxable estate shall be determined by deducting from the value of the gross estate the deductions provided for in this part.
notes: Amendments1978— struck out “exemption and” after “gross estate the”.Pub. L. 95–600

Effective Date of 1978 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 95–600, title VII, § 702(r)(5)92 Stat. 2939Nov. 6, 1978“The amendments made by this subsection [amending this section and sections 1016, 6324B, and 6698A of this title] shall apply to estates of decedents dying after .”December 31, 1976
